scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cat payload/1.txt payload/2.txt payload/3.txt payload/4.txt payload/5.txt | tr -d '\n\r ' | base64 -d | gzip -dc > dist/release-20260713-0735.html && node patch.mjs dist/release-20260713-0735.html && node share-cache-patch.mjs dist/release-20260713-0735.html
